meta.name: My Travel Budgets — Screen Specifications
meta.screenshotExport: Export from Paper app: Select artboard > Right-click > Export as PNG @2x

screens.name: Home Dashboard
screens.goal: At-a-glance budget health and quick access to recent activity

layout.structure: vertical scroll with fixed bottom nav
layout.safeAreas: top status bar, bottom home indicator

edgeStates.empty: No expenses yet — show illustration + 'Add your first expense' CTA
edgeStates.allSafe: Budget ring fully teal, all categories show green amounts
edgeStates.warning: Budget ring turns amber when >70% spent, affected categories show amber
edgeStates.overBudget: Budget ring turns coral red, over-budget categories show red with exclamation

screens.name: Quick Add Expense
screens.goal: Log an expense in 2-3 taps — speed is paramount

layout.presentation: modal sheet sliding up from bottom

edgeStates.emptyAmount: Save button disabled, no budget impact shown
edgeStates.overBudget: Impact banner turns red: 'Food & Drinks will exceed budget by €34'
edgeStates.loading: Save button shows spinner, inputs disabled

screens.name: Expense List + Filters
screens.goal: Browse and filter all trip expenses by day and category
components: FilterChips (horizontal scroll: All, Food, Transport, Activities...)

layout.grouping: Expenses grouped by day, newest first

edgeStates.filtered: Show 'No food expenses yet' when filter yields no results

screens.name: Budget Breakdown
screens.goal: Detailed spending vs budget comparison per category with pacing guidance
components: SummaryCard (total budget vs spent, stacked bar, category legend)
CategoryDetailCard x3+ (icon, name, count, percentage, bar, pacing text)

edgeStates.noBudget: Show 'Set a budget' CTA for categories without limits
edgeStates.overBudget: Category card shows red percentage, red progress bar overflow indicator

screens.name: Trip Summary
screens.goal: Post-trip review — total spending, insights, per-person breakdown
components: TripHero (complete badge, trip name, date range, traveler count)
InsightCard x3 (Top Spender, Biggest Category, Biggest Day)
PersonRow x4 (avatar, name, expense count, amount)

screens.name: Desktop Dashboard
screens.goal: Full dashboard view with sidebar navigation, stats, categories, and expenses
components: DesktopSidebar (logo, nav items, settings, user avatar)
TopBar (trip name, Add Expense button, notifications)
StatCard x4 row (Total Budget, Spent, Remaining, Daily Average)
Left: Budget by Category card (CategoryProgressRow x5)

layout.navigation: sidebar replaces bottom nav on desktop

screens.name: Add/Edit Categories
screens.goal: Manage budget categories — create, edit name/budget/icon, delete

layout.expandBehavior: accordion — only one category expanded at a time

edgeStates.noCategories: Empty state with 'Create your first category' CTA
edgeStates.deleteConfirmation: Confirmation dialog: 'Delete Activities? This will uncategorize 3 expenses.'

screens.name: Add/Edit Trip
screens.goal: Create or edit trip details — name, destination, dates, budget, travelers
components: DateInput row: Start Date / End Date (with calendar icons)
AvatarChip grid (with Admin badge for owner)

edgeStates.newTrip: Title changes to 'New Trip', fields are empty, no Delete button
edgeStates.deleteConfirmation: Confirmation dialog: 'Delete Lisbon 2026? All 47 expenses will be lost.'
edgeStates.inviteFlow: Opens share sheet or invite modal with link
edgeStates.saving: Save button shows spinner, inputs disabled
